title: Dekton 10/XL Flexi Grip Latex Coated Working Gloves | Ultimate Protection for DIY and Tradesmen | Ultra Grip Material | CE Cat 2 and EN388 Certified | Ideal for Protection in Various Task
features: Ultimate Protection for Heavy-Duty Tasks: The Dekton Working Gloves are designed for professional use, offering superior protection in demanding environments. The latex coating provides a robust barrier against cuts, abrasions, and punctures, making these gloves ideal for tradesmen and DIY enthusiasts.

Ultra Grip Material for Enhanced Safety: Featuring a specialized ultra-grip material, these gloves ensure a secure hold on tools and materials, reducing the risk of slippage. The enhanced grip makes them perfect for tasks that require precision and control, improving safety and efficiency.

Latex Coated for Durability and Comfort: The latex coating not only adds durability but also offers a comfortable fit. This coating enhances the glove’s resilience while maintaining flexibility, ensuring long-lasting performance without sacrificing comfort during extended use.

CE Cat 2 & EN388 Certified: These gloves meet CE Category 2 and EN388 standards, providing reassurance of their quality and safety. The certification confirms their effectiveness in protecting against mechanical risks, including abrasion, blade cuts, tearing, and puncturing.

Ideal for Various Applications: Whether you’re engaged in construction, maintenance, or other heavy-duty tasks, these gloves are designed to meet your needs. Their professional-grade construction makes them suitable for a range of applications where extra protection and grip are essential.
description: The Dekton Working Gloves are engineered for superior protection and performance in demanding work environments. Featuring a durable latex coating, these gloves provide exceptional resistance against cuts, abrasions, and punctures, making them ideal for heavy-duty tasks and professional use. The ultra-grip material enhances safety by offering a secure hold on tools and materials, reducing slippage and improving precision. Designed with comfort in mind, the gloves combine durability with flexibility, ensuring a snug yet comfortable fit for extended use. They meet CE Category 2 and EN388 standards, guaranteeing reliable protection against mechanical risks such as abrasion, blade cuts, tearing, and puncturing. Perfect for tradesmen, DIY enthusiasts, and any task requiring extra protection, these gloves deliver both safety and functionality. Whether you're working on construction sites, handling heavy materials, or engaging in detailed tasks, the Dekton Working Gloves offer the ultimate protection and grip you need to get the job done safely and efficiently.
